PaymentStreamâ¢ Direct
1	Introduction to PaymentStreamâ¢ Direct
1.1	Overview of PaymentStream Direct
PaymentStream
Direct is a user interface that provides access to Central 1âs Payments products,
MemberDirect
Â®
system support features, and related administration functions via a single sign-on to the Client Centre. The options you see on
PaymentStream
Direct are determined by
the functions that your financial institution implements, and
your personal access rights.
Your financial institution can implement
PaymentStream
Direct to its banking system with or without connectivity. However, some functions are only available if
PaymentStream
Direct is connected to your banking system (e.g., customer profile functions and customer alerts).
Important
:	For accounts that require two or more signatures,
PaymentStream
Direct can
only
be used to look up information.
The procedures and screen prints in this Part may differ from those that users see when logged in to
PaymentStream
Direct. This is because your financial institution can implement different functionality and the text on each page is customizable.
